_schema_note: The Ignition Exchange does not publish a versioned manifest.json schema.
This file encodes the metadata that IA's submission form accepts (as of 2026).
Fields are derived from: inductiveautomation.com/exchange/submit field labels,
A real Exchange submission requires: (a) this metadata supplied via the web form,
(b) a ZIP of ignition/project/ + ignition/webdev/ + ignition/gateway-scripts/ +
No official .modl or JAR is required for a Perspective-project/WebDev bundle.
See INSTALL.md §6 for the full submission checklist.
name: MIRA Maintenance Copilot
tagline: AI troubleshooting grounded in your real plant tags — inside Perspective.

resources_bundled.description: Perspective project — ConveyorMIRA. Views: ConveyorStatus, FaultLog, NavBar. Plant-side HMI the technician uses.
WebDev endpoint bundle: /chat (forward query to MIRA Cloud), /tags (tag-browse, folder-scoped), /status, /alerts, /connect (activation), /ingest (manual upload). All Jython 2.7.
Gateway Timer Script (Jython 2.7). Reads leaf tags under the Mira_Monitored folder every 2 s and POSTs a JSON batch outbound to mira-relay over HTTPS.
Tag Change Script. Records state transitions; feeds the FSM anomaly detector.
10-second timer. Fires a stuck-state alert when an asset dwells in one state beyond threshold.
All module configuration (relay URL, tenant ID, stream folder, FSM tuning). Copy to the Gateway data dir — picked up on each script tick, no restart required.
36-tag export (Bool + Int OPC tags + derived expression tags) for the Micro820 Modbus TCP demo device.
Idempotent PowerShell installer. Copies project + WebDev resources, triggers project rescan, and imports tags via Ignition REST API.

install_steps: 1. Verify Ignition Gateway 8.1.20+ is running with Perspective and WebDev modules installed.
2. Allow outbound HTTPS (port 443) to *.factorylm.com from the Gateway host. No inbound ports.
3. Run: git clone https://github.com/Mikecranesync/MIRA && cd MIRA
4. Run the installer: PowerShell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ignition\deploy_ignition.ps1
5. Copy ignition/config/factorylm.properties.template to the Gateway data directory (see INSTALL.md §3).
6. Set RELAY_URL and TENANT_ID (received from FactoryLM activation) in factorylm.properties.
7. In Ignition Designer, add the three gateway scripts (tag-stream.py, tag-change-fsm-monitor.py, timer-stuck-state.py) as Gateway Event Scripts (Timer + Tag Change).
8. Create one tag folder: [default]Mira_Monitored. Drag into it only the tags MIRA should see.
9. Open Perspective in a browser. The ConveyorStatus view should show live tag values.
10. Ask a question in the Chat panel (once D2/D3 cloud endpoint is wired — see INSTALL.md §5).

security_model_summary.network: Outbound HTTPS (443) to *.factorylm.com only. No inbound ports, no VPN, no reverse tunnel.
security_model_summary.tag_access: Read-only. Folder-scoped to [default]Mira_Monitored — MIRA reads only what you place there.
security_model_summary.plc_writes: None. No system.tag.writeBlocking anywhere in this bundle.
security_model_summary.auth_shipped: Shared bearer key (RELAY_API_KEY) per tenant. Stored in factorylm.properties on the Gateway.
security_model_summary.auth_roadmap: Per-tenant HMAC-SHA256 + nonce replay protection (development item D4).
security_model_summary.pii: Engine-side PII sanitization (IP, MAC, serial scrubbing) on by default before any LLM call.
security_model_summary.safety: Arc-flash, LOTO, and confined-space queries trigger STOP escalation — never an auto-generated procedure.

pricing: Free to install. A FactoryLM tenant account is required for tag streaming and cloud AI. See factorylm.com/pricing.
_submission_checklist: Replace screenshot placeholders in docs/promo-screenshots/ with real Perspective captures.
Zip ignition/project/ + ignition/webdev/ + ignition/gateway-scripts/ + ignition/config/ for the Exchange upload.
Bump version field above to 1.0.0 before first public release.
Complete development items D1-D3 (allowlist enforcement + cloud chat endpoint) before claiming grounded-answer capability to customers.
IA Exchange review typically takes 1-2 weeks after submission.
Note: this is the secure-module listing (WebDev + gateway scripts). The lightweight Perspective-widget listing lives at mira-ignition-exchange/.
